ground_truth_rows.event_description: [Wiki/ISW] Khamenei and top military commanders killed; strikes targeted MOIS, LEC, and Mehrabad Airport missile depot.
[Wiki/ISW] Combined forces struck the IRGC Navy base and a nearby elementary school, resulting in over 180 casualties.
[Wiki/ISW] Iranian ballistic missiles struck Tel Aviv and Bnei Brak, resulting in civilian casualties.
[Wiki/ISW] Iranian drones and missiles struck Dubai Int'l Airport, Burj Al Arab, Fairmont Hotel, and Palm Islands.
[Wiki/ISW] Iranian missiles and drones targeted the US Fifth Fleet headquarters and residential areas.
[Wiki/ISW] Iranian drones/missiles struck Kuwait Int'l Airport and heavily damaged Ali al Salem Airbase.
[Wiki/ISW] An Iranian airstrike hit Zayed International Airport, killing 1 and wounding 7.
[Wiki] A US Precision Strike Missile hit a sports hall in Lamerd, killing 21 people.
[Wiki/ISW] US/combined airstrikes targeted the PMF headquarters in Jurf al-Nasr (Jurf al Sakhr).
[ISW] IDF struck dozens of ballistic missile launchers at Amand Missile Base and targeted Sahand University.
[Wiki] Multiple Iranian Shahed drones strike French naval air station Camp de la Paix in Abu Dhabi.
[Wiki] An Iranian ballistic missile strike on a synagogue in Beit Shemesh killed 9 people.
[Wiki] The Israeli Air Force launched airstrikes across Tehran, targeting IRGC and Basij facilities.
[Wiki] The Islamic Republic of Iran Navy's Moudge-class frigate IRIS Jamaran is sunk by U.S forces off Chabahar Port.
[ISW] The IAF destroyed one Iranian F-4 and two F-5 fighter jets at the Artesh Air Force 2nd Tactical Airbase in Tabriz.
[ISW] The combined force destroyed a mobile radar system at the IRGC Ground Forces Shahid Ali Arabi Airbase in Zahedan.
[ISW] The combined force destroyed a launcher and a missile storage facility at the Esfahan North Missile Base near Najafabad.
[ISW] Combined force airstrikes destroyed drone storage facilities and sank two patrol frigates in Konarak.
[ISW] Iranian strikes destroyed major portions of an army unit that manages housing for US troops at Camp Arifjan, Kuwait.
[ISW] Iran struck the Jabal Ali Port in Dubai, which serves as the US Navy's largest port of call.
[ISW] Combined forces struck the Natanz Nuclear Facility, severely damaging at least three buildings.
[ISW] Combined forces struck MOIS command centers, IRIB HQ, Quds Force, Basij bases, and Bid Ganeh missile facility.
[Wiki/ISW] Two Iranian drones struck the US Embassy in Riyadh, causing a limited fire and minor damage.
[Wiki/ISW] Iranian drones and missiles struck Saudi Aramco's oil refinery in Ras Tanura, causing large fires and forcing its closure.
[Wiki/ISW] Iranian drones struck the US Embassy; 3 US F-15E jets crashed via friendly fire, and two Kuwaiti navy members were killed.
[ISW] Commercially available satellite imagery shows bunker buster bomb impacts at the IRGC Aerospace Force Imam Ali Missile Base in Khorramabad.
[ISW] Combined forces targeted the HESA drone manufacturing facility (Shahed drones) in Shahin Shahr.
[Wiki/ISW] US CENTCOM sank 11 Iranian vessels, including the IRGC Navy drone carrier IRIS Shahid Bagheri, in the Gulf of Oman.
[ISW] Airstrikes targeted the Kurdistan Province Law Enforcement Command (LEC) Headquarters in Sanandaj.
[ISW] Drones targeted the former US Victory Base and the Iraqi Special Operations Headquarters in Baghdad.
[ISW] Combined force airstrikes targeted and damaged two key bases for IRGC Ground Forces Sarallah Headquarters in Tehran.
[ISW] The IDF struck hangars and bunkers in a restricted area of the Artesh Shahid Farashahi ammunition depot in Manzariyeh.
[Wiki/ISW] Iranian ballistic missiles struck the BAPCO refinery near Ma'ameer, starting a fire at the facility.
[ISW] The oil tanker Sonangol Namibe experienced a large explosion caused by an Iranian USV southeast of Mubarak al Kabeer, Kuwait.
[ISW] Combined force conducted airstrikes targeting an IRGC Intelligence Building and IRGC Ground Forces Nabi Akram Operational Division in Kermanshah City.
[ISW] The Iranian Artesh launched drone strikes targeting the US base at Erbil International Airport in Iraq.
[ISW] Iranian forces carried out drone strikes against US forces at Camp Buehring.
[ISW] Airstrike damage was observed at the IRGC 3rd Hazrat-e Mehdi Ranger Brigade base in Khuzestan Province.
[ISW] A drone struck a power generator at the US-operated Sarsang oil field in Duhok Province, causing a fire and forcing closure.
[ISW] Airstrikes in Tabriz targeted the Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting (IRIB) broadcast station or a radio repeater.
[ISW] The IAF struck 50 high-rise buildings and the IRGC Aerospace Headquarters in Beirut.
[Wiki] Iranian drones struck oil storage facilities at the port of Salalah, causing several fuel tanks to burst into flames.
[Wiki] Two tankers carrying Iraqi oil and gas caught fire after being struck in Iraqi territorial waters near the Al-Faw port area.
[ISW] Security sources reported that airstrikes targeted and destroyed a PMF military base in Musayyib, Babil Province.
[ISW] Hezbollah launched a rocket barrage of over 100 rockets, with OSINT analysts reporting multiple impacts in Haifa.
[ISW] Two Iranian drones struck near the Dubai International Airport, injuring four workers and reducing flight traffic.
[ISW] Israeli drones targeted Basij and internal security checkpoints across Districts 1, 14, 15, and 16 in Tehran City.
[ISW] The combined force struck an IRGC intelligence building and a border guard headquarters in Marivan City.
[ISW] Satellite imagery shows severe damage at the Shahroud missile complex's solid-fuel production lines.
[ISW] Satellite imagery shows damage to an Iranian F-14 Tomcat fighter aircraft at the Iranian Artesh Air Force 8th Tactical Air Base in Esfahan.
[Wiki/ISW] Israeli strikes assassinated SNSC Secretary Ali Larijani and Basij Commander Soleimani; Quds Force and Basij bases also struck.
[Wiki/ISW] An Iranian Khorramshahr missile struck Ramat Gan, killing two people. Cluster munitions also hit Rishon Lezion and Holon.
[Wiki/ISW] An oil tanker and export terminal in Fujairah were struck by a drone/projectile, causing a fire and suspending oil loadings.
[ISW] Combined forces struck an underground missile base south of Shiraz and the 7th Artesh Air Force Tactical Airbase.
[ISW] Combined forces struck the Imam Hussein Strategic Missile base south of Yazd City.
[ISW] IDF struck a missile production defense site in Tabriz.
[ISW] The combined force struck an ammunition depot in Sirjan, Kerman Province.
[ISW] A Shahed drone struck near the US Embassy entrance in the Green Zone; Royal Tulip hotel also hit.
[ISW] More than 10 drones targeted the US Consulate and Erbil International Airport.
[ISW] A drone strike targeted the 40th PMF Brigade site in Kirkuk Province.
[Wiki/ISW] IDF struck MODAFL, MOIS HQ, and IRGC facilities. Iran threatened Gulf energy systems.
[Wiki/ISW] 15 people injured in central Israel; Iran launched cluster munition missiles at the Tel Aviv area.
[ISW] UAE intercepted 25 drones and 4 ballistic missiles; data centers near Abu Dhabi were struck.
[ISW] IRGC claimed to target the US Fifth Fleet base in Manama, Bahrain.
[ISW] Combined force airstrikes caused a fire at the 8th Tactical Air Base in Esfahan.
[ISW] Iranian-backed militias' rocket fire injured five Iraqi Counter Terrorism Service members at Baghdad Int'l Airport.
[ISW] Combined force conducted three drone strikes on PMF positions in Jurf al Sakhr.
[ISW] Combined force airstrikes damaged an underground missile base between Gerash and Lar.
[ISW] Combined force struck the Imam Hossein strategic ballistic missile base south of Yazd City.
[ISW] IDF struck the Qasmiyeh Bridge on the Litani River and killed senior Hamas financier Walid Mohammad Dib.
[ISW] IDF conducted massive airstrikes using 60+ jets against weapons production infrastructure at the Parchin military complex.
[ISW] Combined force conducted northeastern-most strikes around Mashhad International Airport and industrial areas.
[ISW] IDF struck an IRGC Quds Force weapons production site and a major defense industry site in Esfahan Province.
[ISW] Combined force struck the IRGC Ground Forces Ansar ol Hossein Provincial Unit in Hamedan City.
[ISW] Combined force struck the 63rd Popular Mobilization Forces (PMF) base in Amerli District, Iraq.
[ISW] An Iranian cluster munition impacted in Tel Aviv, injuring two people.
[Wiki] Two people were killed and three injured by falling debris from an intercepted ballistic missile.
[ISW] Hezbollah rocket fire killed an Israeli man in the northern Israeli city of Nahariya.
[ISW] Combined forces conducted strikes targeting an industrial town around Neyshabour, Khorasan Razavi Province.
[ISW] The IDF struck an IRGC headquarters around Bonab, East Azerbaijan Province.
[ISW] Combined force struck the Marine Industries Organization (MIO) and Parchin Military Complex defense industrial sites.
[Wiki] Iranian attacks targeted the major smelter facility of Aluminium Bahrain in Askar, Southern Governorate.
[Wiki] Emirates Global Aluminium facility in Abu Dhabi sustained significant damage from Iranian drone/missile strikes.
[ISW] Combined force struck the deeply buried Yazd Missile Base and a MODAFL explosives manufacturing site.
[ISW] Combined force struck the 6th Tactical Airbase, Bushehr Airport, and the SADRA marine industrial company.
[ISW] Two Iranian drones struck the Port of Salalah, damaging port infrastructure and causing Maersk to halt operations.
[ISW] Iranian drones struck Kuwait International Airport, destroying a radar system and setting fuel tanks on fire.
[Wiki/ISW] Airstrikes targeted the PMF Northern and East Tigris Operations Command headquarters in Kirkuk.
[ISW] IDF struck a site involved in producing air defense system components in Arak, Markazi Province.
[ISW] Combined force struck the Kavir Steel Company, a major steel plant supporting the defense industrial base.
[Wiki/ISW] The Kuwaiti oil tanker Al Salmi was hit by an Iranian drone at a port in Dubai, causing a fire.
[ISW] Iran attacked the oil tanker AQUA 1, 17 nautical miles northwest of Ras Laffan, Qatar.
[ISW] An Iranian drone hit a telecommunications company's administrative building in central Sharjah.
[ISW] The combined force struck a Saraya al Jihad-PMF military facility in Anbar Province.
[ISW] Hezbollah conducted a complex ambush with IEDs, ATGMs, and rockets targeting an IDF armored column in Beit Lif.
[ISW] US forces used a high volume of bunker-buster munitions to strike a munitions depot in Esfahan.
[ISW] The IDF struck a warhead casting factory and missile components site at the Parchin Military Complex.
[ISW] The IDF struck a ballistic missile engine testing and component production site in Khojir.
[ISW] Satellite imagery shows extensive damage at the Iran Shipbuilding and Offshore Industries Complex (ISOICO) west of Bandar Abbas.
[ISW] The combined force struck Kataib Hezbollah facilities associated with the 45th PMF Brigade in Jurf al Sakhr.
